---
title: "STSCI 5740 Project Report"
format: pdf
fontsize: 12pt
papersize: a4
linestretch: 1.5
---

## Report Inputs

This report links directly to artifacts produced by STSCI5740_Data.qmd.

```{r}
summary_path <- "artifacts/data/readmission_by_age.csv"
figure_path <- "artifacts/figures/readmission_by_age.png"

if (!file.exists(summary_path) || !file.exists(figure_path)) {
  stop("Missing artifacts. Render STSCI5740_Data.qmd first.")
}

summary_tbl <- read.csv(summary_path)
summary_tbl
```

## Readmission Summary by Age

```{r}
knitr::kable(summary_tbl, digits = 4, caption = "Readmission summary by age group")
```

## Readmission Figure

```{r}
knitr::include_graphics(figure_path)
```
